title: SieveError.source field is pub(crate) with no public accessor documented
description: parse_error.rs SieveError.source is pub(crate). External callers wanting line/col from a lex error can only use std::error::Error::source() returning dyn Error, not the concrete ParseError. The struct docs are silent on this. Document the limitation or add a pub accessor, so users know how to get location info for Lex errors.
